headline: Host Hotels & Resorts Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call to be Held on May 7, 2026
summary: BETHESDA, Md., March 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”), the nation’s largest lodging real estate investment trust, will report first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the market close. The Company will hold a conference call to discuss its first quarter 2026 results and business outlook on Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET. headline: Shares of travel-related companies are trading higher amid a drop in oil prices after President Trump posted on social media that the U.S. postponed strikes on Iranian power generation and energy assets for five days, which may ease inflation concerns. ICE agents deployed to airports to ease TSA shortages amid a partial government shutdown may alleviate travel complications.
summary: Shares of travel-related companies are trading higher amid a drop in oil prices after President Trump posted on social media that the U.S. postponed strikes on Iranian power generation and energy assets for five days, which may ease inflation concerns. ICE agents deployed to airports to ease TSA shortages amid a partial government shutdown may alleviate travel complications.
